reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCMjlySkRREAE

reviewer.displayName: Alejandra Fabiana custodia Siri de De Bonis

reviews.comment:
Nos robaron con el precio de la nafta. Lamente no darme cuenta a tiempo.. Y ademas, no hay otra ypf cerca. 247 el litro de infinia cuando en CABA está 200 aprox el litro.

(Translated by Google)
We got ripped off with the price of gas. I regret not realizing it sooner. And besides, there's no other YPF station nearby. 247 pesos per liter of Infinia when in Buenos Aires it's around 200 pesos per liter.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChRDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCcmYwRhAB

reviews.comment:
Mucha cantidad de autos para cargar pero es ágil el personal

(Translated by Google)
A lot of cars to load but the staff is agile.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención.  Encontré en Full  las bebidas y golosinas que necesitaba

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. I found the drinks and snacks I needed at Full.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCMGRPSzJnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lamentablemente el único lugar para abastecerse de combustible en la zona. Largas e interminables colas. Y los precios respecto a Bs As. 15 % más caros

(Translated by Google)
Unfortunately, it's the only place to get fuel in the area. Long, endless lines. And the prices are 15% higher than in Buenos Aires.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCMGJxQTR3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Es la única estación en la zona, por lo tanto se juntsn muchos vehículos Hay que tener paciencia hasta que llega tu turno .Un pico lento

(Translated by Google)
It's the only station in the area, so it gets very crowded. You have to be patient until it's your turn. A slow rush.

(Translated by Google)
